title: Mildly Smoky Saudi Arabian Lamb Pasta
description: A peppery and creamy Saudi Arabian dish featuring linguine pasta, perfect for a weeknight dinner, with a smoky flavor and low-fat friendly ingredients.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the linguine pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat and cook the lamb shoulder until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, black pepper, and garlic powder to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the low-fat yogurt and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the lamb and sauce.
Season with salt to taste, then sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
